description_long: This is a heavily rusted and weathered pickup truck with a boxy, vintage design, featuring a prominent hood and a slightly raised cab. The body is predominantly covered in a mottled pattern of reddish-brown rust and greenish corrosion, giving it an abandoned, aged appearance. The windshield is cracked and partially obscured by a large purple flower decal and a white starburst, adding a touch of color and character to the otherwise dilapidated exterior. The side windows are streaked and appear dirty, while the wheels are dark and partially sunken into the body, suggesting disuse. The rear of the vehicle is flat, with a visible cargo bed area, though it is also rusted and shows no signs of recent use. Overall, the truck exudes a sense of neglect, with its rough, corroded surfaces and faded details.
description: A rusted, vintage pickup truck with a cracked windshield, purple flower decal, and heavily weathered surfaces. The body is mottled with rust and corrosion, giving it an abandoned look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cracked windshield with a large purple flower decal and a white starburst, as well as the headlights and rusted grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the boxy cab, streaked windows, and the extensive rust and corrosion along the body panels.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the flat, rusted cargo bed and the back window, with corrosion dominating the surface.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the purple flower decal on the hood and the overall weathered, rusted appearance.
